privileged_info_summary: The task is based on the real ESI v4 (Emergency Severity Index Version 4) algorithm published by AHRQ. The algorithm consists of five triage levels: Level 1 (Resuscitation-RED), Level 2 (Emergent-ORANGE), Level 3 (Urgent-YELLOW), Level 4 (Less Urgent-GREEN), and Level 5 (Non-Urgent-BLUE). Decision Point C asks 'How many different types of resources will this patient need?' with branches: zero resources→Level 5, one resource→Level 4, and two or more resources→Decision D. Decision Point D evaluates danger zone vital signs (HR>100, RR>20, SpO2<92%) to determine Level 3 or uptriage to Level 2. The task requires completing a diagram in draw.io with proper text labels (resource, vital, danger, level 3/4/5), color-coding all ESI levels, and removing the initial TODO placeholder.
